mnemonics: CHENG SOON ONG: Concepts He Explained Navigate General Subjects On Numerical Optimization, Naturally Guiding
keyPoints: His work focuses on machine learning optimization
He emphasizes the importance of convex optimization in ML
He contributes to developing efficient algorithms for large-scale problems
commonMistakes: Confusing his work with general optimization theory without ML context
Overlooking the applied aspects of his research in favor of pure theory
Assuming all his methods are applicable to non-convex problems without modification
